welcome.title: Welcome to ClawDeck
welcome.description: A web interface for managing OpenClaw Agents.
features: View and manage all Agent statuses
Edit Agent core config files (SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, etc.)
welcome.hint: Click Next to learn about each feature module.

overview.title: Overview Panel
overview.description: Overview panel displays Agent core information:
items: Basic Info: Assistant ID, name, service port, etc.
Runtime Status: Real-time CPU/memory usage, uptime
Channel Config: Feishu, Open-ClawChat enabled status
Statistics: Installed skills, current rooms, config files count
overview.hint: Status auto-refreshes every 5 seconds to ensure you see the latest data.

basic.title: Basic Configuration
basic.description: Basic configuration sets Agent basic properties:
items: Display Name: Name shown externally in chat rooms
basic.hint: Note: Assistant ID cannot be modified after creation, it's the unique identifier.

channels.title: Channel Configuration
channels.description: Channel configuration manages Agent communication methods:

files.title: Configuration File Management
files.description: Configuration files are the core of Agent, click files below to edit:
files.backup: Auto Backup: System automatically creates backup to .backups/ directory on each modification.

logs.title: Operation Logs
logs.description: Operation logs help you monitor Agent running status:
items: Log Levels: Debug / Info / Warning / Error
Log Types: System / Chat / Error / Audit
Search Filter: Quickly locate logs of interest
Auto Refresh: View latest logs in real-time
logs.hint: Logs are displayed in timeline format, newest logs at the top.

actions.title: Quick Actions
actions.hint: Dangerous operations (delete) have secondary confirmation to avoid accidents.

finish.title: Get Started
finish.description: You have learned ClawDeck's core features.
nextSteps: View overview to understand Agent current status
Edit SOUL.md to customize Agent personality
Configure channels to connect Agent to chat platforms
View logs to monitor running status
finish.hint: To view this guide again, click the User Guide button in the top right.

fileUseCases.title: Configuration Examples
fileUseCases.description: Click an example to see how to configure specific features

catGirl.title: Cat Girl Persona
catGirl.description: Make the Agent speak in a cute cat girl tone
catGirl.content:
# Personality Setting

You are a cute cat girl who adds "Meow~" when speaking

- Tone: Cute, coquettish, lively
- Catchphrases: "Meow~", "Master~"
- Behavior: Express emotions in cat-like ways

professional.title: Professional Assistant
professional.description: Make the Agent respond in a professional, rigorous manner
professional.content:
# Personality Setting

You are a professional business assistant who speaks concisely and efficiently

- Tone: Professional, polite, concise
- Traits: Answer questions directly without extra content
- Behavior: Use honorifics, provide structured responses

autoReply.title: Smart Reply Judgment
autoReply.description: Let the Agent decide whether to reply on its own
autoReply.content:
# Agent Configuration

## Reply Judgment Rules

- Only reply when directly @mentioned or asked a question
- Stay silent during casual chat
- Execute clear commands immediately and reply

basic.title: Basic Identity Setup
basic.description: Set up the basic identity information for the Agent
basic.content:
# Identity Information

## Basic Info

- Name: Assistant
- Identity: AI Smart Assistant
- Age: Forever 18
- Gender: Neutral

## Background Story

I am an AI assistant powered by the OpenClaw framework, dedicated to helping users complete various tasks.

detailed.title: Detailed Identity Setup
detailed.description: Create a complete identity background for the Agent
detailed.content:
# Identity Information

## Personal Profile

**Name**: Xiaoming
**Occupation**: Senior Customer Service Specialist
**Experience**: 5 years
**Expertise**: Customer communication, problem solving, product consulting

## Personality Traits

- Patient and detail-oriented, good at listening
- Proactive and helpful
- Professional and trustworthy

## Work Principles

1. Customer first, dedicated service
2. Quick response, efficient resolution
3. Continuous learning and improvement

webSearch.title: Enable Web Search
webSearch.description: Configure web search tool to let Agent search for information
webSearch.content:
# Tool Configuration

## Available Tools

### 1. web_search - Web Search

Use when users ask for latest information, news, or things you don't know.

**Parameters:**
- query: Search keywords (required)
- limit: Number of results to return, default 5

**Example:**
```
Use tool web_search:
query: "Latest tech trends 2024"
```

calculator.title: Enable Calculator
calculator.description: Configure calculator tool to let Agent perform calculations
calculator.content:
# Tool Configuration

## Available Tools

### 1. calculator - Calculator

Use when users need mathematical calculations.

**Parameters:**
- expression: Mathematical expression (required)

**Example:**
```
Use tool calculator:
expression: "125 * 36 + 89"
```

### 2. datetime - Get Current Time

Use when users ask for current time or date.

**Parameters:**
- format: Time format, options: date, time, datetime

roomManager.title: Room Management Skill
roomManager.description: Configure detailed instructions for room management functionality
roomManager.content:
# Skill Description: Room Management

## Function Overview

This skill allows the Agent to create, join, and manage chat rooms.

## How to Use

### Create Room
- Command: "Create room" or "New room"
- Can set room password and question
- Can choose room expiration time

### Join Room
- Command: "Join room [room number]"
- Will prompt for password if required

### Leave Room
- Command: "Leave room" or "Exit room"

## Notes

- Rooms automatically close after set time
- Room owner has management privileges and can kick members
- Remember the room number for next time

userPreference.title: Remember User Preferences
userPreference.description: Configure Agent to remember user preference settings
userPreference.content:
# Working Memory

## User Preference Records

### Communication Preferences
- Preferred answer style: concise or detailed
- Preferred form of address
- Preferred language

### Task Preferences
- Working hours
- Priority settings
- Common tools and methods

## Important Information

Record key information shared by users:
- Project deadlines
- Important contacts
- To-do items

longTerm.title: Long-term Memory Template
longTerm.content:
# Long-term Memory

## User Profile

### Basic Information
- User ID:
- Registration date:
- Usage frequency:

### Interaction History
- First conversation time
- Commonly used features
- Feedback records

### Personalized Data
- Preference settings
- Common commands
- Special requirements

## Learning Records

Record information learned from conversations to improve service quality.
